iterations.theme: From CocoaHub's Genesis to Conference Challenges and the Future of Remote Work
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast is treated as a single thematic unit due to its total length (54 minutes) being less than the minimum required for multiple iterations (approx. 35-45 minutes per iteration).
